reasoning: Dr. Blake is the only suspect who had access to Floor 4 around the time of death. He entered Floor 4 at 9:25 PM, shortly before the estimated time of death at 9:30 PM, as observed by Nurse Patel. The syringe found in the sharps container contained potassium chloride, which matches the cause of death. Dr. Blake's lab coat was found in the Floor 4 laundry bin, indicating he was there despite his claim of not going above the second floor. His alibi is contradicted by the evidence, making him the most likely suspect.
